summary: Comprehensive testing completed for YouTube Real-Time Analytics Platform. All backend APIs and frontend features working perfectly with live YouTube data integration.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/dashboard returns valid data with all required fields (videos, kpis, insights, categories, demographics, engagement_distribution, growth_data, competitive, heatmap, data_source, last_updated)
Frontend loads successfully with 4 KPI cards (total_activity, engagement_quality, growth_velocity, opportunity_index) with correct data-testid attributes
Tab navigation works perfectly - all 5 tabs (overview, engagement, category, growth, competitive) with correct data-testid attributes
Overview tab displays video cards with thumbnails, engagement rates, and health badges
Engagement tab shows multiple charts (engagement distribution histogram, scatter plot, velocity chart, box plot) - 26 chart elements found
Category tab displays category performance chart, demographics pie chart, and heatmap table
Growth tab shows growth ranking, trend predictions, emerging content matrix, and opportunity table
Competitive tab displays radar chart, benchmarks, and 2x2 matrix
Dark/Light mode toggle works perfectly via data-testid theme-toggle
Data source badge correctly shows 'LIVE DATA' from YouTube API
Refresh button works via data-testid refresh-button
Insight callout panels display correctly on each tab
Mobile responsiveness excellent - all elements accessible and functional
Live YouTube API integration working (50 videos fetched)
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
